generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisDigitalTwin
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder measuring position for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current measurements from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentification, MotionAccuracyEnhancement
    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

    base:isContainedIn MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment
